hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite nonexistent or fabricated papers with future 2025 arXiv IDs that do not correspond to real publications (e.g., Winata et al. arXiv:2506.01789, Loizou arXiv:2508.16255, Rahal arXiv:2502.13198).
hallucinations.evidence: References [3], [4], [6] in the paper's References section list arXiv preprints dated 2025 with IDs that cannot be verified as real.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: several nonexistent citations with fabricated future arXiv references. Experimental results and methodology appear consistent with the provided synthetic code implementation.
